title: Update attack path diagram icons to match file type names

requirements.text: Replace icon images for seven specific attack path diagram icons at XPath locations /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[3]/div[12]/img[1], div[13]/img[1], div[14]/img[1], div[15]/img[1], div[16]/img[1], div[17]/img[1], and div[18]/img[1] with uploaded images word.png, pdf.png, excel.png, script-1.png, zip.png, dll-1.png, and ppt.png respectively, mapping each image to its corresponding icon type based on file name semantics

quotes: change image of the icons based on there names

acceptanceCriteria: Icon at div[12]/img[1] uses word.png for Word document icon
Icon at div[13]/img[1] uses pdf.png for PDF document icon
Icon at div[14]/img[1] uses excel.png for Excel/CSV document icon
Icon at div[15]/img[1] uses script-1.png for script file icon
Icon at div[16]/img[1] uses zip.png for archive file icon
Icon at div[17]/img[1] uses dll-1.png for DLL/library file icon
Icon at div[18]/img[1] uses ppt.png for PowerPoint document icon
All seven uploaded images are correctly mapped to their respective IconType values in AttackPathIcon.tsx

constraints: Must preserve existing drag-and-drop functionality in AttackPathIcon.tsx
Must maintain backward compatibility with existing diagram state that references these icon types
nonGoals: Modifying other icons not specified in the seven XPath locations
Changing the IconType enum or type system
Altering the canvas rendering logic beyond icon image sources
